summary: Solid soundboard recording (with audience‑source patches for three tunes) that deadheads value for its rarity.
review: Both reviewers are enthusiastic about the availability of this uncirculated show, noting that Alabama Getaway, The Greatest Story Ever Told and Foolish One Too Deep have been patched from an audience source. No specific musical criticisms or praises are given, but the high star ratings suggest a generally positive impression of the performance.

ai_rating.rationale: High star scores (5 and 4) indicate strong appreciation; recording is mainly soundboard with minor audience patches, no reported audio problems.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mainly a soundboard capture; three songs (Alabama Getaway, The Greatest Story Ever Told, Foolish One Too Deep) are patched in from audience recordings, which may cause slight tonal inconsistencies.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers focus on rarity rather than performance details.
